data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm whether the waiting room feature is enabled by default, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the waiting room feature, but it does not confirm its default status. Therefore, this indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the necessary evidence to validate the requirement is missing.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the waiting room is enabled by default.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
